title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.359 - Rules authorized, procedure
text:
135.359.  Rules authorized, procedure. — The director or the commission may require the filing of additional documentation necessary to determine the accuracy of a tax preference claimed under the provisions of this section through the promulgation of rules.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 135.350 to 135.363 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1990 H.B. 960 § 3 subsec. 4, A.L. 1991 S.B. 185, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1248 & 1048, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
